overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy suburban night in a video game (GTA V). The player starts at a street intersection, watches a car pass by, then walks along the wet pavement and sidewalk past palm trees and residential houses with white fences.

events.description: white sedan approaches from the right and drives through the intersection
begins walking forward across the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection corner then proceeding to walk across as traffic passes

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with red painted curbs reflecting street lights
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the rain
suburban house with illuminated windows visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: Standing at a rainy suburban intersection at night, the camera watches a white sedan pass through before beginning to walk across the wet asphalt. Street lights cast glowing reflections on the pavement while palm trees line the distant road.

events.description: turns left and transitions from the street onto the sidewalk area
passes close by a large utility pole on the right side

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main road and stepping onto the sidewalk area

entered.detail: wet asphalt street surface continuing past the intersection
thick wooden utility pole with street lamp attachment
wet concrete pavement running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the intersection along the residential street, the camera turns left toward the sidewalk. A large utility pole passes by on the right as the concrete sidewalk becomes visible on the left, with palm trees now lining the right side of the road.

events.description: fully enters the sidewalk corridor with white picket fences on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the residential sidewalk past houses with illuminated windows

entered.detail: white wooden picket fence bordering the residential front yard
single-story suburban home with gabled roof and lit porch windows
octagonal stop sign on a pole at the street corner

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow suburban sidewalk, the camera passes a white picket fence and a house with warm lights glowing from within. The stop sign marks the corner behind as the path continues through the rainy residential neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked suburban intersection into the quiet depths of a residential neighborhood at night. It begins by watching a white sedan pass through the intersection before the camera moves across the wet asphalt, where street lights cast glowing reflections on the pavement. As the camera moves away from the crossing, it turns left toward the sidewalk, passing a large utility pole while palm trees begin to line the right side of the road. The scene then shifts to a narrow concrete path, gliding past a white picket fence and a house with warm interior lights glowing through the rain. Finally, the camera leaves a distant stop sign behind as it continues its steady walk through the dimly lit suburban street.
